introSection: Crazy Caterpiller is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Amusement Rides Factory currently located at Pettitts Animal Adventure Park in Reedham, Norfolk, England, UK.
fullText:
Crazy Caterpiller is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Amusement Rides Factory currently located at Pettitts Animal Adventure Park in Reedham, Norfolk, England, UK.

Standard Wacky Worm layout.
